architectural_purpose: deterministic replay and rollback visibility without recovery rollback execution or execution
explicit_limitations: v4.1 Phase 7 creates deterministic replay and rollback visibility metadata only.
v4.1 Phase 7 does not enable rollback execution.
v4.1 Phase 7 does not enable replay execution.
v4.1 Phase 7 does not enable recovery execution.
v4.1 Phase 7 does not enable remediation.
v4.1 Phase 7 does not enable automatic correction.
v4.1 Phase 7 does not enable orchestration execution.
v4.1 Phase 7 does not enable automatic sequencing.
v4.1 Phase 7 does not enable migration execution.
v4.1 Phase 7 does not enable planner integration.
v4.1 Phase 7 does not enable production consumption.
v4.1 Phase 7 does not enable mutation behavior.
explicit_prohibitions: No silent replay or rollback correction behavior exists.

Rollback manifest visibility is descriptive.

Rollback drift conflict is visible and not corrected.
Replay lineage discontinuity is visible and not repaired.
Rollback lineage discontinuity is visible and not repaired.
Replay provenance discontinuity is visible and not inferred.

Stale replay evidence is visible and not suppressed.
Stale rollback evidence is visible and not suppressed.
Unsupported replay provider is visible and not normalized.
Unsupported rollback provider is visible and not normalized.
Replay execution path is prohibited and visible.
Rollback execution path is prohibited and visible.
Blocked replay state is visible and not recovered.
Blocked rollback state is visible and not recovered.
